holdings.n: Fidelity Securities Lending Cash Central Fund

holdings.infoBox: FSMD is an equity ETF with a total of 601 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 3.70%, Fidelity Securities Lending Cash Central Fund at 1.03%, Lumentum Holdings at 0.94%, Comfort Systems USA at 0.92%, and Ciena at 0.90%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Small-Mid Multifactor ETF (FSMD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity Small-Mid Multifactor index. The fund tracks a multi-factored index of US companies. FSMD was launched on Feb 26, 2019 and is issued by Fidelity.
